title: Abbreviations of Vaccines and Other Immunizing Agents | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
quadrivalent
Top of Page 
J – M 
JE-MB 
Inactivated, mouse brain-derived Japanese encephalitis vaccine (JE-Vax) (no longer available) 
JE-VC 
Inactivated, vero cell culture-derived Japanese encephalitis vaccine (Ixiaro)
LAIV 
Live, attenuated influenza vaccine
LAIV3 
Live, attenuated influenza vaccine, trivalent (FluMist)
LAIV4 
Live, attenuated influenza vaccine, quadrivalent (FluMist Quadrivalent)
MCV 
Measles antigen-containing vaccines
MCV4 
Tetravalent meningococcal polysaccharide-protein conjugate vaccine
MenACWY 
Meningococcal serogroups A, C, W, and Y vaccine (Menveo, MenQuadfi)
MenACWY-CRM 
Meningococcal serogroups A, C, W, and Y
oligosaccharide diphtheria CRM 197 conjugate vaccine (Menveo) 
MenACWY-TT 
Meningococcal serogroups A, C, W, and Y
polysaccharide tetanus toxoid conjugate vaccine (MenQuadfi)
MenACWY-D 
Meningococcal serogroups A, C, W, and Y polysaccharide diphtheria toxoid
conjugate vaccine (Menactra) (no
longer available) 
MenB 
Serogroup B meningococcal vaccine (Bexsero,
Trumenba)
MenB-FHbp 
Serogroup B factor H binding protein meningococcal vaccine (Trumenba) 
MenB-4C 
Serogroup B meningococcal vaccine (Bexsero) 
MenABCWY 
Meningococcal serogroups A, B, C, W, and Y conjugate vaccine (Penbraya,
Penmenvy)
MenACWY-TT/MenB-FHbp 
Meningococcal serogroups A, B, C, W, Y polysaccharide tetanus toxoid conjugate/ MenB-FHbp combination vaccine (Penbraya)
MenA
